nodes.name: install-template.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell installer template for Archon skill packages targeting Windows. Creates the required directory structure under ~/.copilot, copies agents and skills, and supports -Force and -DryRun flags. Uses {{PACKAGE_NAME}} as a placeholder for customization.

nodes.name: install-template.sh
nodes.summary: Shell installer template for Archon skill packages targeting macOS/Linux. Creates directory structure under ~/.copilot, copies skill artifacts, and supports --force and --dry-run flags. Uses {{PACKAGE_NAME}} as a placeholder for customization.

nodes.name: readme-template.md
nodes.summary: README template for packaged Archon skills. Provides markdown structure for documenting package name, description, installation instructions, available skills/agents, usage examples, and license information.

nodes.name: website-template.html
nodes.summary: HTML landing page template for packaged Archon skills. A large (1405-line) self-contained HTML file with inline styles providing a professional website layout for skill package marketing pages.
